id: Dont Look Back in Anger Oasis
folderName: Dont Look Back in Anger Oasis
setting: 過去の言い争いを引きずって怒っている友人Aに対し、Bが「もう忘れなよ、前を向こう」と励ますシーン。
lyrics:
Slip inside the eye of your mind
Don't you know you might find
A better place to play?
You said that you'd never been
But all the things that you've seen
Will slowly fade away

So I'll start a revolution from my bed
'Cos you said the brains I had went to my head
Step outside, the summertime's in bloom
Stand up beside the fireplace
Take that look from off your face
You ain't ever gonna burn my heart out

And so Sally can wait
She knows it's too late as we're walking on by
Her soul slides away
"But don't look back in anger," I heard you say

Take me to the place where you go
Where nobody knows if it's night or day
Please don't put your life in the hands
Of a Rock 'n' Roll band
Who'll throw it all away

I'm gonna start a revolution from my bed
'Cos you said the brains I had went to my head
Step outside 'cause summertime's in bloom
Stand up beside the fireplace
Take that look from off your face
'Cos you ain't ever gonna burn my heart out

And so Sally can wait
She knows it's too late as she's walking on by
My soul slides away
"But don't look back in anger," I heard you say

So Sally can wait
She knows it's too late as we're walking on by
Her soul slides away
"But don't look back in anger," I heard you say

So Sally can wait
She knows it's too late as she's walking on by
My soul slides away
"But don't look back in anger, don't look back in anger"
I heard you say, "at least not today"

lyricsJa.en: Slip inside the eye of your mind
lyricsJa.ja: 心の目の中に入り込んでごらん

lyricsJa.en: Don't you know you might find
lyricsJa.ja: 見つかるかもしれないって知ってるかい？

lyricsJa.en: A better place to play?
lyricsJa.ja: もっと素敵な遊び場が

lyricsJa.en: You said that you'd never been
lyricsJa.ja: 行ったことがないって言ってたね

lyricsJa.en: But all the things that you've seen
lyricsJa.ja: でも君が見てきたすべてのものは

lyricsJa.en: Will slowly fade away
lyricsJa.ja: ゆっくりと消えていくだろう

lyricsJa.en: So I'll start a revolution from my bed
lyricsJa.ja: だからベッドの上から革命を起こすんだ

lyricsJa.en: 'Cos you said the brains I had went to my head
lyricsJa.ja: 君が「うぬぼれてる」なんて言うからさ

lyricsJa.en: Step outside, the summertime's in bloom
lyricsJa.ja: 外に出よう、夏が真っ盛りだよ

lyricsJa.en: Stand up beside the fireplace
lyricsJa.ja: 暖炉のそばに立って

lyricsJa.en: Take that look from off your face
lyricsJa.ja: そんな顔をするのはやめてくれ

lyricsJa.en: You ain't ever gonna burn my heart out
lyricsJa.ja: 君に僕の心までは焼き尽くせやしない

lyricsJa.en: And so Sally can wait
lyricsJa.ja: そう、サリーは待つことができる

lyricsJa.en: She knows it's too late as we're walking on by
lyricsJa.ja: 僕らが通り過ぎる頃にはもう遅いと分かっているんだ

lyricsJa.en: Her soul slides away
lyricsJa.ja: 彼女の魂はすり抜けていく

lyricsJa.en: "But don't look back in anger," I heard you say
lyricsJa.ja: 「でも怒りにまかせて振り返らないで」って君が言うのが聞こえたんだ

lyricsJa.ja: 君が行く場所へ連れて行ってくれ

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: I can't believe he said those things to me.
sentences.displayHtml: I can't believe he said those things to me.

sentences.text: It's been two weeks, and I'm still so mad.
sentences.displayHtml: It's been two weeks, and I'm still so mad.

conversation.japanese: 彼があんなこと言ったなんて信じられないよ。もう2週間も経つのに、まだすごく頭にきてるんだ。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: I know you're hurt, but you need to take that look from off your face.
sentences.displayHtml: I know you're hurt, but you need to take that look from off your face.

conversation.japanese: 傷ついてるのはわかるけど、その暗い顔はやめなよ。気にするだけ無駄だよ。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: But how can I just forget it?
sentences.displayHtml: But how can I just forget it?

sentences.text: Every time I think about it, my blood boils.
sentences.displayHtml: Every time I think about it, my blood boils.

conversation.japanese: でも、どうやってただ忘れろっていうの？思い出すたびに血が煮えくり返りそうだよ。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Eventually, all those bitter feelings will slowly fade away.
sentences.displayHtml: Eventually, all those bitter feelings will slowly fade away.

sentences.text: You have to give it time.
sentences.displayHtml: You have to give it time.

conversation.japanese: 最終的には、そんな苦々しい感情もゆっくりと色褪せて消えていくものさ。時間が必要なんだよ。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: I just feel like I need some closure before I can move on.
sentences.displayHtml: I just feel like I need some closure before I can move on.

conversation.japanese: 君の言う通りかもしれない。ただ、次に進む前にふんぎりが必要な気がして。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Please, just don't look back in anger.
sentences.displayHtml: Please, just don't look back in anger.

conversation.japanese: ふんぎりは自分自身の心の中でつけるものさ。お願いだから、怒りにまかせて過去を振り返らないで。許して、忘れなよ。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: Yeah, I shouldn't let this ruin my weekend.
sentences.displayHtml: Yeah, I shouldn't let this ruin my weekend.

sentences.text: I need to find a better place to play and just enjoy myself.
sentences.displayHtml: I need to find a better place to play and just enjoy myself.

conversation.japanese: うん、こんなことで週末を台無しにするべきじゃないね。もっと楽しく過ごせる場所を見つけて、ただ楽しむことにするよ。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Let's step outside; it's a beautiful day.
sentences.displayHtml: Let's step outside; it's a beautiful day.

conversation.japanese: その意気だよ！さあ外に出よう、今日はすごくいい天気だからね。
